summary: Iteration 73 - Multi-Market System Tests PASSED. All 14 backend tests pass after fixing cart add validation bug. Products endpoint correctly returns available_in_country, display_price, display_currency per country. Cart add properly blocks unavailable products.
passed_tests: GET /api/products?country=ES - 13 products, all available_in_country=true, EUR prices
GET /api/products?country=US - 1 product available (Olive Oil at $29.99 USD)
GET /api/admin/market-coverage - returns ES: 23 products, US: 1, DE: 1
GET /api/producer/products/{id}/markets - returns inventory_by_country array (3 markets for Olive Oil)
PUT /api/producer/products/{id}/markets - rejects SLA > 48h with proper error
PUT /api/producer/products/{id}/markets - rejects active with 0 stock with proper error
POST /api/cart/add - allows adding available product (ES locale)
POST /api/cart/add - blocks unavailable product (KR locale) with 'Product not available in this region (KR)'
POST /api/cart/add - blocks ES-only product for US user with proper error
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED BUG: Cart add endpoint was not properly blocking products with inventory_by_country when user's country had no active market. Added check at line ~2605: if inventory has entries but no market matches user's country, block the add.
Multi-market validation now works correctly: Products with inventory_by_country are blocked in regions without active market entry.
Stock validation prevents activating markets with 0 stock
Olive Oil (prod_7889643617d1) has 3 active markets: ES (€24.99), US ($29.99), DE (€25.99)
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (fixed cart add multi-market validation at line ~2605-2614)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 73 multi-market system verified: 1) Products endpoint with country filter returns available_in_country, display_price, display_currency per product. ES has 23 products, US has 1 (Olive Oil), DE has 1. 2) Cart add validates inventory_by_country: if product has inventory entries but user's country has no active market, returns 400 'Product not available in this region'. 3) GET /geo/detect-country returns country from IP headers (default ES). 4) GET /admin/market-coverage aggregates products/sellers/stock/SLA by country. 5) GET/PUT /producer/products/{id}/markets for seller market management with SLA ≤ 48h and stock > 0 validation. Fixed bug where cart add was not properly blocking products without user's country in inventory_by_country.
mocked_api_notes: No mocked APIs - all endpoints tested against real backend

bug_fix_applied.issue: Products with inventory_by_country were not blocked when user's country had no active market entry
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added check: if inventory has entries but no market matches user's country, raise 400 'Product not available in this region'
